title: Oil Prices May Not Fall Soon, U.S. Energy Secretary Says
summary_full: Energy Secretary Chris Wright said the Strait of Hormuz, a critical passageway for oil shipments, remained unsafe for tankers. Iran has been firing projectiles and laying mines.
summary_public: Energy Secretary Chris Wright said the Strait of Hormuz, a critical passageway for oil shipments, remained unsafe for tankers. Iran has been firing projectiles and laying mines.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Iran has been firing projectiles and laying mines
